title: Solara Canmore 1BR
definition: A one-bedroom at Solara under typical STR assumptions runs near -$400/month — better than a studio, still sensitive to occupancy.
reality_check: Parking and in-unit amenities drive rate

faq.a: Usually marginal; positive outcomes need strong occupancy and disciplined costs.
Often north of mid-60s at modeled rates — stress-test lower before you offer.
See the Solara 2BR analysis on this site for a side-by-side signal.
